source: FSSAI Schedule IV summaries, ASCI guidelines (paraphrased for the simulator)
license: summary excerpts — refer to original notifications for legal text

policies.title: Cold-chain logging for perishables
policies.summary: Retailers handling perishable dairy and leafy greens must record cold-chain temperature continuity at least every 30 minutes. Inventory without a current cold_chain_log entry cannot be sold.

policies.title: Farmer-traceability for produce
policies.summary: Acceptances of farmer surplus must record the originating farmer_id. Anonymous farmer acceptances will be auto-declined and may attract penalty.

policies.title: Influencer disclosure mandate
policies.summary: Trend-driven restock decisions must include a source_verification field documenting whether the originating signal was a paid promotion, and what corroborating consumer data was checked.

policies.title: Emergency discount cap
policies.summary: During declared supply shocks, discount multipliers cannot fall below 0.40. The legacy `price_multiplier` field is replaced with `clearance_action` to clearly signal regulatory awareness.
